cases.description: Least-privilege pinned workflow and complete governance

cases.workflow:
name: CI
on: [pull_request]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

name: CI
on: [push]
permissions: write-all
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: true

name: CI
on: [pull_request]
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

name: CI
on: [pull_request]
permissions: {}
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/action@main

name: CI
on: [pull_request]
permissions: {}
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/action@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567 # v1

name: triage
on:
  pull_request_target:
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  inspect:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.base_ref }}
          persist-credentials: false

name: dangerous
on:
  pull_request_target:
permissions:
  contents: write
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
      - run: ./build.sh
        env:
          TOKEN: ${{ secrets.RELEASE_TOKEN }}

name: promote
on:
  workflow_run:
permissions:
  packages: write
jobs:
  promote:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: git fetch origin refs/pull/1/head && ./release.sh
        env:
          TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PACKAGE_TOKEN }}

name: release
on: [push]
permissions:
  contents: write
jobs:
  release:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@9c091bb21b7c1c1d1991bb908d89e4e9dddfe3e0
      - run: ./release.sh

name: label
on:
  pull_request_target:
permissions:
  pull-requests: write
jobs:
  label:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/metadata-action@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567

name: triage
on: [issues]
permissions:
  issues: write
jobs:
  triage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/moderator@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
        with:
          close-pr: true

name: triage
on: [issues]
permissions:
  issues: write
jobs:
  triage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/moderator@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
        with:
          lock-pr: yes

name: triage
on: [pull_request]
permissions: {}
jobs:
  triage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/moderator@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
        with:
          detect-spam-usernames: true

name: triage
on: [pull_request]
permissions: {}
jobs:
  triage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/moderator@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
        with:
          min-account-age: 30

name: triage
on: [pull_request]
permissions: {}
jobs:
  triage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/moderator@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
        with:
          min-global-merge-ratio: 50

name: triage
on: [pull_request]
permissions: {}
jobs:
  triage:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: owner/moderator@0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567
        with:
          detect-spam-usernames: false
          min-account-age: 0
          min-global-merge-ratio: 0
